articles.title: Sam Neill Dead; Jurassic Park Actor Was 78 - Deadline
articles.description: Jurassic Park actor Sam Neill has died suddenly in Australia

articles.title: July 12, 2026 — US launches strikes on Iran for a second night - CNN
articles.description: The US conducted new strikes hours after a major air assault on Iran. Tehran targeted Gulf nations over the weekend.

articles.title: NASCAR Cup Series race at Atlanta restarted after 3-hour weather delay - The Tennessean
articles.description: The Quaker State 400 NASCAR Cup Series race on July 12 at EchoPark Speedway was delayed for more than three hours for lightning and rain.

articles.title: Stock futures slip after U.S., Iran exchange airstrikes again; Kospi plunges 7%: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Traders weighed the latest events in the Middle East and braced for a slew of corporate earnings reports due out later in the week.

articles.title: Security breach causes chaos, delays start of final Jay-Z concert at Yankee Stadium - ABC7 New York
articles.description: A police source tells Eyewitness News a large group broke through security, prompting a full lockdown of the stadium.

articles.title: Stephen Chow’s ‘Kung Fu Soccer’ Kicks Off With Mighty $74 Million Two-Day Debut at China Box Office - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: The 'Shaolin Soccer' spinoff, Stephen Chow's first film as director in seven years, is projected to earn more than $350 million in its home market, with plans for a U.S. release still in the works.

articles.title: Oil prices jump as US and Iran trade attacks over Strait of Hormuz - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Brent crude climbs more than 4 percent as Washington and Tehran clash over control of critical waterway.

articles.title: What to know: Two cases of cyclosporiasis confirmed in NH, DHHS says - WMUR
articles.description: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention is tracking cases of cyclosporiasis, a parasitic infection, in 31 states — including New Hampshire. Here's what you need to know.

articles.title: ‘Love Island USA’ Season 8 Crowns Its Winners - Variety
articles.description: On Sunday, Bryce and Trinity were chosen as the winners of "Love Island USA" Season 8 during the final episode, which aired on Peacock.

articles.title: Want to own a real T. rex? It could cost you $30 million - NPR
articles.description: The Tyrannosaurus rex fossil known as "Gus" will go up for auction on Tuesday. It's not the first time dinosaur bones have been sold to the highest bidder.

articles.title: How Indian scientists are mapping the brain's last frontier - BBC
articles.description: India's new brainstem atlas offers scientists an unprecedented map of one of the brain's least known regions.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro Release Date: Apple’s Strategic Choice Can Defeat Rivals - Forbes
articles.description: Apple’s September launch of the iPhone 18 Pro allows it to learn from its Android rivals. Samsung and Google will take the pain as Apple reaps the benefits.

articles.title: US Senator Mitch McConnell says absence due to fall and pneumonia - BBC
articles.description: The veteran Republican says he will not return to work "quite yet", in his first statement following weeks of speculation about his health.
